cutters.name: Cutters
cutters.description: Raise manual extraction strength for this resource on the current planet.

survey.name: Survey Mapping
survey.description: Improve all yield for this resource on the current planet.

lattice.name: Process Lattice
lattice.description: Add a late-game efficiency layer for the same resource chain.

harmonics.name: Yield Harmonizer
harmonics.description: Synchronize the extraction chain to push broader production on this resource.

overdrive.name: Pulse Overdrive
overdrive.description: Inject a heavy manual extraction spike for deeper industrial loops.

cascade.name: Deep Core Cascade
cascade.description: Late-system amplification for the most demanding production networks.

uranium-reactor-core.name: Uranium Reactor Core
uranium-reactor-core.description: Massive reactor assemblies push uranium extraction far beyond standard lattice tuning.

uranium-breeder-cycle.name: Uranium Breeder Cycle
uranium-breeder-cycle.description: Closed-loop breeder control turns every uranium seam into a high-output energy backbone.

uranium-criticality-overdrive.name: Uranium Criticality Overdrive
uranium-criticality-overdrive.description: Unsafe on paper and perfect in practice. This overdrive step turns uranium into a true late-game jackpot.

rig.name: Field Rig
rig.description: A rugged extractor that keeps a basic stream running on this planet.

array.name: Extraction Array
array.description: A stabilized automation platform tuned to this resource chain.

condensed-carbon.name: Condense Carbon
condensed-carbon.description: Compress raw carbon into a denser, more useful fuel block.

refined-metal.name: Refine Metal
refined-metal.description: Purify ferrite into standardized structural metal.

oxygen-cells.name: Pack Oxygen Cells
oxygen-cells.description: Stabilize oxygen into portable pressure and fuel cells.

mechanical-parts.name: Assemble Mechanical Parts
mechanical-parts.description: Combine refined material into machine-grade moving components.

basic-circuits.name: Print Basic Circuits
basic-circuits.description: Build simple control boards for miners and ship systems.

titanium-alloy.name: Forge Titanium Alloy
titanium-alloy.description: Blend titanium with refined structural stock for high-stress hull and station work.

reactor-cores.name: Assemble Reactor Cores
reactor-cores.description: Seal enriched uranium and crystal regulators into compact cores for apex logistics.

hull.name: Hull Frame
hull.description: A pressure-rated shell strong enough to survive launch.

thrusters.name: Thruster Stack
thrusters.description: A patched propulsion system that can escape the first planet.

guidance.name: Guidance Core
guidance.description: Primitive avionics good enough for short interplanetary routes.

shuttle.name: Frontier Shuttle
shuttle.description: Fast and light. Good for early scouting and tight transport loops.

hauler.name: Ore Hauler
hauler.description: Slow, bulky, and built to move large loads between nearby worlds.

cruiser.name: Star Cruiser
cruiser.description: A balanced mid-tier hull that can open deeper routes without giving up cargo.

quantum_ship.name: Quantum Vessel
quantum_ship.description: A late-game carrier that crosses the system quickly and handles the heaviest runs.

phase_clipper.name: Phase Clipper
phase_clipper.description: A fast tier-4 courier built to pierce deep routes before heavier freighters arrive.

void_freighter.name: Void Freighter
void_freighter.description: A dense tier-4 bulk hauler that trades speed for serious system-wide cargo pulls.

singularity_ark.name: Singularity Ark
singularity_ark.description: The first true apex-tier logistics platform, strong enough to open the uranium frontier.
